content_body: We had a wonderful time! Photos do not do this beautiful cabin justice. The cabin is huge with three levels with spacious decks overlooking the river. We were traveling with two families and teenagers, and there was plenty for them to do ~ Game room with pool table, arcade, and TV, exploring the river and train tracks. Kitchen is well stocked. The management company also responded quickly and gave us suggestions for rainy days. I would definitely recommend this cabin and this company to those looking for a very special experience.
title: Great Cabin for 2 Families and Teenagers
